name: AKWEL S.A. INH.  EO 0,8
summary: Akwel S.A. is a France-based automotive supplier specializing in fluid management and mechanisms. The company designs, develops, and manufactures components and systems for thermal management, fluid transfer, and vehicle mechanisms for automotive manufacturers. Akwel S.A. is headquartered in Moirans-en-Montagne, France.
